outfit_info.outfit_description: This urban-inspired outfit features a vibrant printed mesh top beneath a black leather jacket, paired with sleek black stirrup leggings. Brown suede sneakers and a matching shoulder bag complete the look. It's a casual yet edgy ensemble, perfectly suited for a rainy city day, blending comfort with a cool, effortless vibe.

model_attributes.body: Slender physique with wet, styled hair, exuding a confident and raw demeanor while engaging the camera.
model_attributes.pose: Standing frontally with a slight lean, holding and eating a sandwich, looking directly at the viewer.
model_attributes.background: Rainy urban street scene with brick buildings, vibrant graffiti, and blurred street activity in the distance.
